name: Tom Peterson's birthday
summary: Tom Peterson's birthday (brother). Surface a reminder the morning of so she can text or call.

name: Angela's own birthday
summary: Angela's own birthday. Quiet acknowledgment, no production.

name: Janet Peterson's birthday
summary: Janet Peterson's birthday (mother). Surface the reminder two days ahead so she can mail a card to Portland in time.

name: Annual primary care checkup with Dr. Patricia Hanover at Aloha Wellness Clinic
summary: Annual primary care checkup with Dr. Patricia Hanover at Aloha Wellness Clinic.

name: Sam Oestreicher's birthday
summary: Sam Oestreicher's birthday (dive partner). Surface the morning of for a text or surf-day plan.

name: 30 AM HST
summary: Field dive at Hanauma Bay for Phase III transect re-survey. Meet at the dock 6:30 AM HST.

name: 30 AM HST
summary: Surf session with Sam, Kai, and Noa at Diamond Head Cliffs, 7:30 AM HST.

name: 00 PM HST
summary: Grant progress report due to the Coastal Conservation Fund. Portal submission by 5:00 PM HST.

name: 00 AM to 2:00 PM HST
summary: Autumn reef-health outreach talk at Waikiki Aquarium; Angela presenting on coral monitoring, 10:00 AM to 2:00 PM HST.

name: 30 AM HST
summary: Surf session with the crew at Queens, 7:30 AM HST.

name: 00 PM HST
summary: Phase III interim report due to Dr. Palani by 5:00 PM HST.

name: 00 AM HST
summary: Biannual skin check with Dr. Jason Yee at Island Skin Care Center, 10:00 AM HST.

name: Thanksgiving
summary: Thanksgiving. Tom visiting from San Jose for the long weekend; airport pickup at HNL.

name: 30 AM HST
summary: Winter-swell surf session at Walls, 7:30 AM HST.

name: 30 AM HST
summary: Field dive at Hanauma Bay for the Phase III winter transect re-survey. Dock at 6:30 AM HST.

name: Coastal Conservation Fund grant progress report due via portal
summary: Coastal Conservation Fund grant progress report due via portal
